meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Ship Fast
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client work. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate your development workflow and ship faster.
content.answer_block: The 'Antigravity' project template solves the 'can't finish' syndrome by enforcing rigid architectural constraints and pre-wiring boilerplate. By integrating this with Claude Code, you offload the cognitive burden of project scaffolding, enabling you to transition from a blank screen to a production-ready MVP in under thirty minutes.
content.intro:
The graveyard of unfinished side projects is paved with good intentions and broken architecture. As a freelancer, the gap between a promising concept and a shippable product is where your profitability dies. Every hour spent wrestling with environment configuration or boilerplate setup is an hour you aren't billing, and more importantly, an hour that drains your creative momentum.

But what if you could bypass the 'blank page' phase entirely? The Antigravity project template isn't just code; it's a structural framework designed to eliminate decision paralysis. When paired with the raw velocity of Claude Code, you transform from a struggling coder into a high-throughput delivery machine, shipping polished solutions before your competitors even finish their README files.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base project architecture to ensure type safety and modularity from the first line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard template with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Use AI to enforce strict data contracts, preventing schema drift as the project evolves.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my requirements for a client dashboard and generate the core Supabase schema and TypeScript interfaces.

steps.title: Component Modularization
steps.description: Break UI requirements into atomic components using the Antigravity component library patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable auth-protected layout component and a data-table component based on the Antigravity design system.

steps.title: Implement API Routes
steps.description: Automate backend logic to ensure rapid data flow between the database and the frontend.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write secure API handlers for user data CRUD operations following the Antigravity middleware pattern.

steps.title: Final Production Audit
steps.description: Run a final automated check to ensure your project meets performance and security standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a code audit on the current directory for performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities.

pro_tips: Always use a custom .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from indexing your node_modules or massive asset folders, keeping context windows clean.
Treat your Antigravity template as a living document; update your base template every time you refine a recurring pattern for a client.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests alongside your features to maintain a 'test-first' velocity without the manual overhead.
Leverage the 'Antigravity' CLI flags to conditionally include or exclude heavy dependencies, keeping your bundle size lean for client deployments.
Before finalizing, ask Claude Code to explain the architectural trade-offs made during the scaffolding process to ensure you can defend the tech stack to your clients.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to Vercel or Railway using the Antigravity CI/CD pipeline, then document your workflow to create a 'Golden Path' for your future freelance projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting incomplete projects eat your revenue. By standardizing your build process, you reclaim your time and scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
